biological_replicate: we introduced Flag epitope-tagged wild-type (WT) AR into PC3 prostate cancer cells
technical_replicate: RNA-seq was performed on triplicate samples
experimental_design: We performed an androgen treatment time course and Af1521 pulldown
factor_value: the synthetic androgen R1881 (2 nM final) was used in most experiments

number_of_biological_replicates: PC3 prostate cancer cells and VCaP prostate cells
